call_transcript:
Agent: Hi Eleanor, this is Mark calling from Finance Solutions. I see you recently inquired about a personal loan on our website. Um, how are you doing today? 
Eleanor: Oh, hi. Yeah, I was just looking at options. 
Agent: Great! So, we're pre-approving you for a $10,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 8.99%. That's, uh, based on the information you provided. What are you hoping to use the funds for, if you don't mind me asking? 
Eleanor: I'm thinking of consolidating some credit card debt. It's just… getting a little out of hand. 
Agent: I understand completely. A lot of people are in the same boat. With our Personal Loan, you could consolidate everything into one, lower monthly payment. We can really tailor it to your needs.  Like, we have terms from 24 to 60 months. 
Eleanor: Hmm, 60 months sounds good. What would the monthly payment be roughly? 
Agent: Let me calculate that for you… Okay, at 8.99% over 60 months, your estimated monthly payment would be around $215.  Does that sound manageable? 
Eleanor: Yeah, that's definitely better than what I'm paying now. 
Agent: Excellent! So, to get the process started, I just need to verify a few details.  Can you confirm your address? 
Eleanor: Sure, it's… [address confirmed]. 
Agent: Perfect. And just to confirm, you're currently employed and earning $6500 a month? 
Eleanor: Yes, that's correct. 
Agent: Wonderful.  Okay, Eleanor, I'm happy to say we can move forward with your application.  I'll send you a link to electronically sign the documents.  It should only take a few minutes. 
Eleanor: Okay, great! Thank you so much, Mark. 
Agent: You're very welcome! Have a great day.

Agent: Hello, Mr. Miller? This is Sarah calling from Financial Freedom. We're offering a special promotion on our Signature Credit Card. 
Robert: Where did you get my number? I didn't give anyone permission to call me. 
Agent: Sir, we… uh… we acquired your information through a marketing partner. We're offering a $2500 Signature Credit Card with a low introductory rate. 
Robert: Low? What's the rate? 
Agent: It's 19.99%, sir. 
Robert: 19.99?! That's highway robbery! I already have a credit card, thank you very much. And I want my number removed from your list. 
Agent: Sir, I understand your concern. But this card offers… 
Robert: No, no, I'm not interested. Don't call me again! *click*

Agent: Hi Jessica, this is David from Secure Finance. I'm calling regarding a referral from GreenTech Solutions. They mentioned you might be interested in a Personal Loan. 
Jessica: Oh, yeah, I spoke with someone there. I'm looking at renovating my kitchen. 
Agent: Fantastic! We can definitely help with that. We're pre-approving you for a $15,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 7.49%.  It's a really competitive rate, especially with your excellent credit. 
Jessica: That sounds good. What are the terms? 
Agent: We offer terms from 12 to 72 months. What kind of monthly payment are you comfortable with? 
Jessica: I'd like to keep it under $300 if possible. 
Agent: Let me see… Okay, at 7.49% over 60 months, your monthly payment would be approximately $290.  That includes principal and interest. 
Jessica: Okay, that works. What are the fees? 
Agent: There's a one-time origination fee of 1% of the loan amount, so $150 in your case. And, of course, there's a late payment fee if applicable. 
Jessica: Hmm, okay. Is that the only fee? 
Agent: Yes, those are the primary fees. We pride ourselves on transparency.  We also offer a rate discount if you set up automatic payments. 
Jessica: Oh, really? How much of a discount? 
Agent: 0.25%. So, your rate would drop to 7.24%. 
Jessica: Okay, that's tempting.  Alright, let's do it. I'll set up automatic payments. 
Agent: Excellent! I'm glad to hear that. I'll send you the application link right away. It's a quick and easy process.

Agent: Hi Michael, this is Lisa calling from Premier Financial. I see you filled out an application for our Signature Credit Card online. 
Michael: Oh, yeah, I was just checking out the rewards program. 
Agent: Great! We're pre-approving you for a $5000 Signature Credit Card with a 14.99% interest rate. It offers 2% cashback on all purchases and travel rewards. 
Michael: 14.99%? That's a little high, isn't it? 
Agent: It is slightly above our prime rate, but the rewards program is very generous.  And we have a balance transfer offer if you're looking to consolidate debt. 
Michael: I might be. I have a balance on another card with a higher rate. 
Agent: Perfect! We can definitely help with that. We offer 0% introductory APR for 12 months on balance transfers. 
Michael: Hmm, that's interesting. What's the fee for balance transfers? 
Agent: There's a 3% balance transfer fee. 
Michael: Okay. I need to think about it. I'm not sure yet. 
Agent: Absolutely. I understand. I can email you a detailed brochure outlining all the benefits and fees. Would that be helpful? 
Michael: Yes, please. That would be great. 
Agent: Wonderful. I'll send that over right away.  Feel free to reach out if you have any questions. 
Michael: Thanks, I appreciate it.

Agent: Hello, Ms. Rodriguez? This is Kevin calling from Universal Lending. We're offering a special… 
Patricia: (Interrupting) Oh, here we go again! You guys called me yesterday! I told you I'm not interested! 
Agent: Ma'am, I apologize for the inconvenience. We're offering a $3000 Personal Loan at 24.99%… 
Patricia: 24.99?! Are you kidding me? I'm on a fixed income! I can't afford that!  I want to be removed from your call list immediately! 
Agent: Ma'am, please… 
Patricia: No, no, no! Don't call me again! *click*
